metadata.description: Short prefix used in resource names
Container Registry SKU (Basic for dev, Standard for prod)
Override the generated ACR name. Leave empty to use the default convention (appPrefix + "acr" + environment).
API key used by backend to call the bot HTTP API
API key the bot validates on inbound HTTP requests
Secret key for signing JWT session cookies
Discord OAuth2 redirect URI (full callback URL)
Enable geo-redundant PostgreSQL backup (set true for prod)
PostgreSQL SKU name (Standard_B1ms for dev, Standard_D2ds_v5 for prod)
PostgreSQL high availability mode (Disabled | SameZone | ZoneRedundant)
Key Vault soft-delete retention in days (7 for dev, 90 for prod)
Log Analytics retention in days (30 for dev, 90 for prod)
API Container App CPU (e.g. "0.5" dev, "1.0" prod)
API Container App memory (e.g. "1Gi" dev, "2Gi" prod)
Minimum replicas for the API app (0 = scale to zero when idle)
Minimum replicas for the frontend app (0 = scale to zero when idle)
Public-facing URL for canonical/og tags (e.g. https://rslsiege.com). Leave empty for dev.
Custom hostname to bind to the frontend (e.g. rslsiege.com). Leave empty to skip custom domain binding.
When true, imports the Cloudflare Origin Cert from Key Vault and binds it to the frontend. Set false on first deploy, true after the PFX has been uploaded to KV.
Versionless Key Vault secret URL for the Cloudflare Origin Cert PFX (e.g. https://<vault>.vault.azure.net/secrets/cloudflare-origin-cert). Required when enableCustomDomain is true.
Log retention in days (30 for dev, 90 for prod)
SKU for the container registry (Basic, Standard, Premium)
Override the generated ACR name (must be globally unique, 5-50 alphanumeric chars). Leave empty to use the default: appPrefix + "acr" + environment.
PostgreSQL SKU name (e.g. Standard_B1ms for dev, Standard_D2ds_v5 for prod)
Storage size in GB (32 for dev, 64+ for prod)
API key used by backend to call the bot HTTP API
API key the bot HTTP API validates on inbound requests
Secret key for signing JWT session cookies
Number of days to retain soft-deleted vault/secrets (7 for dev, 90 for prod)
Log Analytics workspace resource ID — Application Insights sends telemetry here (workspace-based mode)
Name of the existing Key Vault where the origin cert PFX will be stored
Log Analytics workspace primary shared key
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity used to import certs from Key Vault. Leave empty to omit (identity block will be SystemAssigned).
Container Apps Environment name — required for the BYO certificate child resource
Custom hostname to bind to the frontend (e.g. rslsiege.com). Leave empty to skip custom domain setup.
When true, binds the Cloudflare Origin Cert from Key Vault to the frontend. Set false on first deploy (before the PFX is uploaded to KV) to avoid a chicken-and-egg error.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity used to authenticate to Key Vault for cert import. Required when enableCustomDomain is true.
Key Vault secret URL for the Cloudflare Origin Cert PFX (e.g. https://vault.vault.azure.net/secrets/cloudflare-origin-cert). Required when enableCustomDomain is true.
Key Vault URI for secret references
Discord OAuth2 redirect URI (non-secret; public URL visible in browser address bar)
ACR admin username for image pull authentication
ACR admin password for image pull authentication
Application Insights connection string for telemetry (pass empty string to disable)
Public-facing URL injected as VITE_PUBLIC_URL into the frontend container (e.g. https://rslsiege.com). Leave empty to omit the variable.
CPU cores for the API app (e.g. "0.5" for dev, "1.0" for prod)
Memory for the API app (e.g. "1Gi" for dev, "2Gi" for prod)
Max replicas for the API app
Minimum replicas for the API app (0 = scale to zero when idle)
Minimum replicas for the frontend app (0 = scale to zero when idle)
CPU cores for the frontend app (e.g. "0.25")
CPU cores for the bot app (e.g. "0.25")

containers.name: siege-api
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'DATABASE_URL', 'secretRef', 'database-url'), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_BOT_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'discord-bot-api-key'), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_BOT_API_URL', 'value', format('http://{0}', variables('botAppName'))), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_GUILD_ID', 'value', parameters('discordGuildId')), createObject('name', 'ENVIRONMENT', 'value', parameters('environment')), createObject('name', 'SESSION_SECRET', 'secretRef', 'session-secret'), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_CLIENT_ID', 'secretRef', 'discord-client-id'), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET', 'secretRef', 'discord-client-secret'), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_REDIRECT_URI', 'value', parameters('discordRedirectUri')), createObject('name', 'BOT_SERVICE_TOKEN', 'secretRef', 'discord-bot-api-key'), createObject('name', 'ALLOWED_ORIGINS', 'value', if(not(empty(parameters('customDomainHostname'))), format('https://{0}', parameters('customDomainHostname')), 'http://localhost:5173'))), if(empty(parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')))))]

containers.name: siege-frontend
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'VITE_API_URL', 'value', ''), createObject('name', 'API_UPSTREAM', 'value', format('http://{0}', variables('apiAppName')))), if(empty(parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')))), if(empty(parameters('publicUrl')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'VITE_PUBLIC_URL', 'value', parameters('publicUrl')))))]

containers.name: siege-bot
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'DISCORD_TOKEN', 'secretRef', 'discord-token'), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_URL', 'secretRef', 'database-url'), createObject('name', 'BOT_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'bot-api-key'), createObject('name', 'DISCORD_GUILD_ID', 'value', parameters('discordGuildId')), createObject('name', 'ENVIRONMENT', 'value', parameters('environment'))), if(empty(parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')))))]

metadata.description: Name of the existing Key Vault
Principal ID of the API Container App managed identity
Principal ID of the Frontend Container App managed identity
Principal ID of the Bot Container App managed identity
